pi_items.source: Task description specifies survey title as '2024 International Data Science Summit - Post-Event Evaluation', which contains the keyword
Task description explicitly states: 'Set the Start Date to March 15, 2025'
Task description explicitly states: 'Expiry Date to March 29, 2025'

Task description states: 'set the End URL to https://www.datasciencesummit2024.org/thank-you'. Metadata value is substring match of full URL. Domain datasciencesummit2024.org does not appear to be a real public website (verified via web search).
Task description states: 'add a Ranking question'. LimeSurvey documentation (https://manual.limesurvey.org/Question_type_-_Ranking) confirms that 'R' is the database code for Ranking question type.

Task description explicitly lists 5 answer options for the ranking question: 'Machine Learning & Deep Learning', 'Natural Language Processing', 'Computer Vision & Image Analysis', 'Data Engineering & MLOps', 'Responsible AI & Ethics'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a LimeSurvey with specific synthetic properties: title containing 'Data Science Summit', start date 2025-03-15, expiry date 2025-03-29, end URL datasciencesummit2024.org/thank-you (which does not appear to be a real public website), a Ranking-type question (type code 'R' in LimeSurvey), and 5 answer options for the ranking question. All metadata values match the requirements specified in the task description.
